_description: Real micro:bit (or any Web Serial / BLE device) connected by hand. Headful Chromium opens, you click Connect + pair, then click Resume in the dashboard (or press Enter in terminal). Waits for the Disconnect button to appear (= connection confirmed) before snapshotting all 6 tabs. Sequential mode keeps the connection alive across clicks; longer clickWait so each tab has time to render live sensor data.

preSteps.value: Pair your micro:bit in the Chrome popup, then click Resume here.
